## Checklist

- [ ] Read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — this change is consistent with the conventions there
- [ ] Conventional commit messages (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, optionally scoped)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion in an issue first
- [ ] No unrelated refactors mixed into this PR
- [ ] If migrations changed: added a new migration file, did not edit a shipped one
- [ ] Vercel preview deploy is green
